answers: Strong passwords, 2FA, avoid suspicious links, update software, VPN, backup data.
Stay safe online: use unique strong passwords, enable two-factor authentication, never click unknown links, and keep your software updated.
Online security basics: use a password manager, enable 2FA everywhere, use a VPN on public Wi-Fi, and back up your important files.
Top tips: strong passwords + 2FA + VPN + regular updates = much safer online presence.
